Lexical
=======

Lexical feature extractors grouped by functional family.

Frequency
---------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated
   :nosignatures:

   ~voxatlas.features.lexical.frequency.lookup.LexicalFrequencyLookupExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.lexical.frequency.word_frequency.WordFrequencyExtractor
   ~voxatlas.features.lexical.frequency.zipf_frequency.ZipfFrequencyExtractor
